brief: tiny-crm-cli build sprint — 12 tasks across frontend, backend, tests, db, docs, devops.

tasks.title: CLI dispatcher in project/src/cli.ts
tasks.detail: Parse argv, route to add-lead / list / convert / report / tag handlers. Print usage on no args.

tasks.title: Storage abstraction in project/src/storage.ts
tasks.detail: Read/write data/leads.json with simple file lock. Auto-create on first write.

tasks.title: add-lead command implementation
tasks.detail: Validate name + email; assign id; append to storage.

tasks.title: list command implementation
tasks.detail: Read all leads; support --status filter; output via formatter.

tasks.title: convert command implementation
tasks.detail: Mark a lead as customer; transition status; record converted_at.

tasks.title: Output formatter for list
tasks.detail: Pretty-print leads as a table with colour-coded status. Mono font friendly.

tasks.title: Help text + usage screens
tasks.detail: Per-command --help output. Top-level usage. Friendly error messages.

tasks.title: Unit tests for add-lead + storage
tasks.detail: Happy path + 2 error paths each. Use any test framework you prefer.

tasks.title: Smoke test script
tasks.detail: End-to-end: add → list → convert → list. Should pass after T-01..T-06 land.

tasks.title: README quickstart
tasks.detail: Install + 5 example commands + JSON schema for lead record.

tasks.title: package.json scripts + tsconfig
tasks.detail: scripts.start, scripts.test, scripts.lint. tsconfig for ES2022.

tasks.title: report command (stretch)
tasks.detail: Aggregate counts by status; last-7d signups. Output via formatter.
